You are lost in the darkness beneath the earth. Soon, it will swallow you.

Play in the dark. Light a match. As it burns, recall a memory of light. When it dies, speak your fear. What waits in the dark? Pass the book widdershins. When the last match dies, each speaks a final memory. Then, silence.
